0.content:
# 🏛️ Active Directory — Group Policy Object (GPO) Changes
Confirms who modified Group Policy Objects and reviews the specific settings that were changed. Uses DS Object Modified (5136) filtered to GPO containers and Domain Policy Changed (4739).

2.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5136")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| filter contains(content, "groupPolicyContainer")
| summarize event_count = count()

4.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4739")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

6.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter (matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5136") AND contains(content, "groupPolicyContainer")) OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4739")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| fieldsAdd EventType = if(winlog.eventid == "5136", "GPO Attribute Change", else: "Domain Policy Change")
| makeTimeseries count(), by: EventType, time:{timestamp}, interval:1h

8.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5136")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| filter contains(content, "groupPolicyContainer")
| fields timestamp, host.name, content
| sort timestamp desc
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:		' LD:AccountMakingChanges EOL
DATA 'DN:	' LD:GPODetails EOL
DATA 'Value:	' LD:Value EOL
DATA 'Type:	' LD:ValueType
"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, AccountMakingChanges,  Value, ValueType, GPODetails, content

10.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4739")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, PerformedBy, content
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| sort timestamp desc

12.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5136")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| filter contains(content, "groupPolicyContainer")
| fields timestamp, host.name, content
| sort timestamp desc
